tagline: Commercial pool management for HOA, condo, and apartment communities across Chicagoland since 1992.

hero.headline:
34 Years Protecting Chicagoland's
Community Pools
hero.subheadline: Your board has better things to do than manage a pool. Aqua-Guard handles staffing, operations, chemistry, and repairs under one roof -- so your community can swim worry-free all season long.
checkmarks: One team for operations and repairs

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Management<br class="hidden md:block">Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From lifeguard staffing to pump repairs, your community gets a single point of contact for every aspect of pool operations. No vendor juggling, no finger-pointing -- just reliable service from a team that has done this for over three decades.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Management
cards.description: Full-service daily operations, maintenance, and oversight for HOA, condo, and apartment community pools. We run your facility so your board doesn't have to.

cards.title: Lifeguard Staffing & Training
cards.description: StarGuard Elite certified lifeguards recruited, trained, and scheduled by our team. Professional, dependable staff at every facility, every shift.

cards.title: Pool Opening & Closing
cards.description: Seasonal startup and winterization handled completely. We prepare your pool for summer operations and protect it through every Chicagoland winter.

cards.title: Water Chemistry Management
cards.description: Precise chemical balancing and continuous water quality monitoring. Safe, crystal-clear water that meets all IDPH health department standards, every visit.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Maintenance
cards.description: In-house pump and equipment repair by the same team managing your pool. No third-party handoffs, no delays -- just fast, accountable fixes.

cards.title: Residential Pool Services
cards.description: Professional maintenance for single-family home pools. The same commercial-grade expertise and reliability brought to your backyard.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Worry-Free Pool Season

steps.title: Schedule a Facility Assessment
steps.description: Tell us about your community pool. We'll visit your facility, evaluate your needs, and deliver an honest, transparent proposal within 48 hours.

steps.title: We Take Over Operations
steps.description: Our integrated team handles everything -- lifeguards, daily maintenance, water chemistry, and equipment repairs. One company, one point of contact, zero headaches.

steps.title: Your Community Enjoys the Pool
steps.description: Residents swim in a clean, safe, professionally managed facility all season long. Your board gets regular reports and responsive communication whenever questions arise.

about.label: Why Communities Trust Aqua-Guard
about.headline: Family-Owned, Locally Rooted, Professionally Run
about.description: Since 1992, the Aqua-Guard team has managed community pools across Chicagoland from our home base in Schaumburg. We are not a franchise or a national chain -- we are a family-owned company where the owners answer the phone and the same team that manages your pool also fixes your equipment. With 65+ pools across Cook, Lake, DuPage, Kane, and McHenry counties, we bring the scale of experience with the accountability of a local partner.

features.title: One Team, No Handoffs
features.description: Operations and repairs handled by the same in-house crew. No coordinating between multiple vendors -- one call solves everything.

features.title: StarGuard Elite Certified
features.description: Every lifeguard meets the highest training standards in the industry. Your community gets qualified, professional aquatic staff every season.

features.title: 34 Years of Local Experience
features.description: We know Chicagoland pools, Chicagoland weather, and Chicagoland health codes. Three decades of doing this right, season after season.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every community is different. We assess your facility, build a custom proposal, and stand behind our pricing with no hidden fees.

guarantee.headline: Our "Season-Long Confidence" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If your facility ever falls below the standard your community expects, we will make it right immediately at no additional charge. We have built our reputation over 34 years on accountability and follow-through -- and we are not about to stop now.

faqs.question: How quickly can you take over our pool management?
faqs.answer: We can typically onboard a new community within 2-3 weeks, depending on the scope. For urgent mid-season transitions, we offer expedited onboarding to ensure zero downtime for your residents.

faqs.question: Do you handle all repairs in-house?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our integrated team manages both daily operations and equipment repairs. No third-party contractors, no finger-pointing between vendors. One team, one call, one solution.

faqs.question: What counties do you serve?
faqs.answer: We manage pools across Cook, Lake, DuPage, Kane, and McHenry counties -- covering 86+ communities from Schaumburg to Crystal Lake, Evanston to Elgin, and everywhere in between.

faqs.question: Are your lifeguards certified?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. All lifeguards are StarGuard Elite certified -- one of the most rigorous aquatic safety programs in the country. We recruit, train, and manage every guard on staff.

faqs.question: Can you manage multiple pools for our association?
faqs.answer: Of course. We currently manage 65+ pools across Chicagoland. Multi-facility communities benefit from a single management contract, consistent service standards, and streamlined communication with your board.

testimonials.name: HOA Board Member
testimonials.text: Aqua-Guard has managed our community pool for years and their team is always professional and responsive. They handle everything from staffing to repairs so our board never has to worry about pool operations.

testimonials.name: Condo Association Manager
testimonials.text: The fact that Aqua-Guard handles both daily operations and equipment repairs with their own team sets them apart. No more coordinating between multiple vendors -- one call handles everything.

testimonials.name: Community Manager
testimonials.text: We switched to Aqua-Guard three seasons ago and the difference has been remarkable. Their lifeguards are well-trained, the pool chemistry is always on point, and their communication with our board is excellent.

contact.headline:

Off Your Board's Plate?
contact.subtitle: Request a free facility assessment and custom proposal. No pressure, no obligation -- just a clear plan for a worry-free pool season.
